pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 32-34: MASTER_NAME constant defined and used to create master partner record via xmlrpc
setup_task.sh line 33: DUPE_NAME constant defined and used to create duplicate partner record via xmlrpc
setup_task.sh line 34: EMAIL constant defined and assigned to duplicate partner; verifier.py line 29 checks for this exact value
setup_task.sh lines 88 and 96: both opportunities created and linked to duplicate partner (dupe_id); verifier.py lines 83-102 verify reassignment of these two specific opportunities

privileged_info_summary: The task consolidates duplicate customer records in Odoo CRM. Two duplicate records exist: 'Hyperion Systems Inc.' (master, contains physical address) and 'Hyperion Systems' (duplicate, contains email support@hyperion-sys.example.com). Two opportunities are incorrectly linked to the duplicate record: 'Battery Backup System' and 'Inverter Upgrade'. The task requires copying the email to the master record, reassigning both opportunities to the master record, and archiving (not deleting) the duplicate record.
